“Suverasaneye nomasa tjinene, orusuvero tjinga aru vandeka omauvi omengi.”—1 Petrus 4:8 Ove nomukweṋu ngu mwa kupasana tji mwa utu ehupo reṋu pamwe, mape kara omauzeu pekepeke. Owo mape ya aye etwa i omuano mbu mu ripura, oumune weṋu mbwa haṋika nomuano mbu mu ungura oviṋa mena romuano mbu mwe kurisiwa. Poo mape ya aye etwa i ovandu varwe poo ovitjitwa mbi mu hiya undjira ko. Povikando tjiva mape ya atu ha vanga okutara koviṋa otja tji vi ri, posi yokutja Ombeibela i tu rakiza kutja ngatu zengurure omauzeu wetu. (Mateus 5:23, 24) Indu tji wa ṱakamisa omirari vyOmbeibela, ove mo munu omazengururiro omasemba komauzeu woye. 1 HUNGIRIREYE KOUZEU WEṊU OMBEIBELA MAI TJA: ‘Oviṋa avihe mbi tjitwa mouye vi tjitwa moruveze Ndjambi ndwa twa po. Eye wa twa po . . . oruveze rwokuhungira.’ (Omuzuvarise 3:1, 7) Kondjeye okutwa po oruveze rwokuhungirira kouzeu weṋu. Raera omukweṋu oumune mbu na wo ohunga nepu ku mamu hungirire. Aruhe ‘hungira ouatjiri’ ku nomukweṋu ngu mwa kupasana. (Ovaefese 4:25) Nandarire kutja wa pindike, kondja kutja amu ha pose. Eziriro epore mari mu vatere kutja otjihungiriro tjeṋu atji ha rire otjiposa otjinene.—Omiano 15:4; 26:20. Nandarire kutja konakukupasana nepu romukweṋu, omambo woye ngaye rire omananyuṋe nomatjate, nu raisa orusuvero nondengero komukweṋu. (Ovakolose 4:6) Kondjeye kutja mu zengurure ouzeu weṋu tjimanga nu amu isa okuhungira kumwe.—Ovaefese 4:26. OVIṊA MBI MO YENENE OKUTJITA: Twapo oruveze orusemba kutja mu hungire ohunga nouzeu weṋu Tje ri ove ngu mo sokupuratena, kondja kutja o ha wire omukweṋu momambo. Oruveze rwoye rwokuhungira maru ya 2 PURATENA NU U ZUVE NAWA OMBEIBELA MAI TJA: “Suverasaneye nomutima watjiri otja ovakriste, nu mu ramange okuyozikasana.” (Ovaroma 12:10) Omuano mbu mo puratene komukweṋu omunanḓengu tjinene. Kondja okuzuva oumune womukweṋu nawa ‘nokuṱirasana ondjenda . . . nu auhe nge riwise kehi yomukwao.’ (1 Petrus 3:8; Jakobus 1:19) O tjiti aayo mo puratene ngunda au hina okupuratena. Tji mo yenene, isa oviṋa mbi mo ungura nu u yandje ombango yoye aihe komukweṋu, poo mu ningira kutja mu hungire kombunda. Indu tji we ripurire komukweṋu ngu mwa kupasana otjomundu ngu mu ri munda umwe, ove kamoo “hakahana okupindika.”—Omuzuvarise 7:9. OVIṊA MBI MO YENENE OKUTJITA: Puratena nombango aihe, nandarire kutja oviṋa mbi mo zuu kavi nakukutjatera Puratena kutja omukweṋu ma vanga okutja vi. Tara komuano mbu ma hungire nombosiro yeraka re 3 KONDJEYE OKUMANA EHUNGI REṊU OMBEIBELA MAI TJA: “Ungura, nu mo munu omahupiro; tji mo haama amo kara pokuhungira mo syonapara.” (Omiano 14:23) Okuzuvasana ohunga nomuano wokuzengurura ouzeu kaku ya yenena, nungwari mamu sokutjita oviṋa mbi mwa zuvasana kutja mamu tjiti. Okutjita nao mape ya aku kamburire mo oviungura ovizeu nozongondjero ozengi, posi yokutja maku mu vatere. (Omiano 10:4) Indu tji mamu ungura kumwe nawa, mamu kara “nondjambi ombwa” moviungura vyeṋu ovizeu.—Omuzuvarise 4:9. OVIṊA MBI MO YENENE OKUTJITA: Tyeye kutja ovikeṋa amuyevari mbi mamu sokutjita kutja mu zengurure ouzeu weṋu Otja oruveze tji maru kayenda tareye kutja mamu yenenisa vi oviṋa mbi mwa zuvasana

Omurumendu omure tjinene Etemo re ra ri esupi tjinene. Omuvero wondjuwo ye wa ri omusupi tjinene. Ombete ye ya ri osupi tjinene. Okanyeti ke ka ri okasupi tjinene. Omurumendu ngwi wa ri omure tjinene! Eye wa ungura omupiṋe wetemo omure tjinene. Eye wa ungura omuvero wondjuwo omure tjinene. Eye wa ungura ombete onde tjinene. Eye wa randa okanyeti okare tjinene. Eye aa haama kotjihavero otjire tjinene. Neye aa ri nesoroko ere tjinene. Eye wa isa ondjuwo ye na katura mehwa enene. Neye wa hupa ozombura ozengi tjinene.

MOMARAKA mu ya tjangerwe rutenga Ombeibela i ungurisa embo rOtjiheberi tjeol nekwao rOtjigrike ndi ri hades ovikando vyokombanda 70. Omambo ayeevari nga ye notjiṋa nonḓiro. Ozombeibela tjiva za toroka omambo ngo otja “eyendo,” “otjovasengwa,” “ohela” poo “ondimba.” Nungwari momaraka omengi kamu nomambo nge twa po nawa omaheero womambo yOtjiheberi nOtjigrike nga. Ombeibela yOtjiherero povikando ovingi ya toroka omambo nga otja “otjovakoke.” Omambo nga tjiri ye heya tjike? Ngatu tare kutja ya ungurisiwa vi motupa tjiva twOmbeibela. Omuzuvarise 9:10 mari tja: “Kaku noviungura nomeripuriro nondjiviro nounongo motjovakoke [tjeol] hapo ku mo i.” Ihi katji nakuheya kutja otjovakoke eyendo rorive tjimuna mu mwa pakwa umwe wovasuverwa vetu. Indu Ombeibela tji mai hungire ohunga neyendo oyo i ungurisa omambo warwe wOtjiheberi nowOtjigrike. Oyo kai ungurisa tjeol na hades. (Genesis 23:7-9; Mateus 28:1) Ombeibela wina kai ungurisa embo ndi tjeol indu tji mai hungire ohunga nomayendo mu mwa pakwa ovandu ovengi pamwe, tjimuna yovazamumwe poo eyendo rovandu ovengi motjitoto tjimwe.—Genesis 49:30, 31. Embo ndi otjovakoke ri heya tjike? Embo raMukuru ri raisa kutja omambo nga “tjeol” na “hades,” nga torokwa otjovakoke ye heya otjiṋa otjinene okukapita nandarire omayendo mu mwa pakwa ovandu ovengi. Okutara kotjihorera, Jesaja 5:14 mari raisa kutja tjeol poo otjovakoke “tja mwahurura otjinyo tjatjo amatji munika oruyewo orunene.” Nandarire kutja otjovakoke [tjeol] tja ṋiṋa rukuru ovaṱi mbu tu hi nakuyenena okuvara, otjo ngunda tji munika aayo katjikuta. (Omiano 30:15, 16) Otjo katji ri tjimuna omayendo wakauriri nge yenena okuura, nungwari ‘otjovakoke katji kuta.’ (Omiano 27:20) Mape hee kutja otjovakoke katji roro okuura. Okutja tjeol poo hades kaye heye omayendo oyeni nge ri poṋa porive, nungwari omambo nga ye sasaneka ongaro ovaṱi ovengi mu ve ri, kutja va pakwa poo kave pakerwe. Omahongero wOmbeibela ohunga nombendukiro ye tu vatera kutja tu mune ondjiviro yokomurungu ohunga nomaheero womambo nga “tjeol” na “hades.” Embo raMukuru ri waneka tjeol na hades (otjovakoke) ku nonḓiro ndji mai kakara nombendukiro. * (Job 14:13; Oviungura 2:31; Omavandururiro 20:13) Embo raMukuru wina ri raisa kutja imba mbe ri mu tjeol poo hades, kawomba porwawo mbaave karere Jehova, nungwari wina ve kamburira mo ovandu ovengi mbaave he mu karere. (Genesis 37:35; Epsalme 55:15) Ombeibela opu i zokuhonga kutja “ovandu avehe ovawa novavi mave penduka movakoke.”—Oviungura 24:15.

Otjomuise-Makuzu tji mo teza omize vyo tjirwa tjongutukiro ya Namibia moi kehi tjimuna o South Africa otjira tjo porotika ihi o African National Congress tji tja uta otjirwa kuno otjihoromende tjombangu yo tjivara yo tjira tjo porotika tjo zo mburu itji o National Party. Mo 1952 o ANC otji ya sembamisa orukosi rovature ovazoozu oku hino' kuzuva no kwiitavera kozoveta no mazeva wombangu wo horomende yo mbangu yehi indo oruveze indo. Ovahongwa ovakwatera va Namibia oku va katoorera otjivepo tjongutukiro. Aveutu orutu rwo va hongwa va Namibia mo South Africa, o South West African Students Body (SWASB) no muyaruke Jariretundu Kozonguizi otjo Peresidenda yayo no mu yaruke Mburumba Kerina otjo mu tjangerepo omunene. O SWASB nandarire kutja tjinene yari mokati kovahongwa, oyo ondja kuna ondwii yotjivepo tjo tji rwa tjongutukiro tji tja kaingama movira vio porotika. Mo 1955 o SWASB airier o South West African Progressive Association (SWAPA) kehi ya Uatja Kaukuetu, oyo ndjauta okuhungama kotjivepo tjo tjirwa tjonguturiro yehi. Okuza mo 1956 omuyaruke Kerina otja hindwa iyom,bara Otjitambi yOvaherero oruveze indo, Hosea Katjikururume KuÞako nu kombunda kuye aku kerikwamba Jariretundu Kozonguizi. Omuyaruke Kerina ongwa yandjere ondunge yo kutja o Ovamboland Peoples Organisation (OPO) oyo ndja tengerapo o Swapo, irire o Swapo mena ro kutja kouye wo pendje kari tjandje ouzeu okumuna ozombatero nena rayo ndaa riraisa kutja oyo muhoko umwe uriri. Mu Ngarano mo 1960 o OPO ai rukururwa o Swapo. Peter Katjavivi, Brian Bassingtwaithe na Ferdiannd Meroro tji va taurira ko Tjauana tjazumba ave vanga oku kapita komurungu posia ave kamburirwa oruveze indo ndari o Southern Rhodesia, ndino o Zimbambwe, va kondjisiwa oku kotorwa ko Namibia, umwe wao mu mbakondjera po Mihoko Omikutasane kutja ave ha korotwa ko Namibia yari Kerina. Ave uarurwa ko Tjauana na veisiwa. Imbwi ounyoko uriri wo viungura vio muyaruke Kerina ngwatire Omandaha mOtjomuise nozo mbura o 89. Otjiuru tjEhi, Hage Geingoba, nOmuhaamise wOmbongarero yOtjiwana, Peter Katjavivi, ivemwe vaimba mbe mu pe ondjozikiro otjo mbangaøe ya katjotjiri.

1. Ourunde wa uta vi? Ourunde wa uta indu Satan tja kora otjizeze otjitenga. Kotjirutenga Satan wa ri omuengeli ohomonena, posi yokutja “keya rora okuungurira ouatjiri.” (Johanes 8:44) Eye wa uta okunanukira omerikotameneno nga pwira Mukuru porwe. Satan wa korera omukazendu omutenga, Eva, ovizeze ne mu pukisa kutja ma kare nonḓuviro ku ye moruveze rwokukara nonḓuviro ku Mukuru. Adam we rikuta kuna Eva mokuhinokukara nonḓuviro ku Mukuru. Omukambo Adam mbwa toora wa eta onḓiro nomauzeu.—Lesa Genesis 3:1-6, 19. Indu Satan tja tjita kutja Eva ma teye etwako raMukuru, eye wa pirukira ousemba waMukuru womananeno. Ovandu ovengi ve rikuta kuna Satan mokupirukira Mukuru otjOmunane wawo. Kunao, Satan wa rira “omuhonapare wouye mbwi.”—Lesa Johanes 14:30; 1 Johanes 5:19. 2. Oviutwa vyaMukuru vya ri notjipo? Oviungura vyaMukuru avihe oviwa. Ovandu novaengeli Mukuru mba mema aave yenene okukara nonḓuviro ku ye pondondo yokombanda. (Deuteronomium 32:4, 5) Mukuru we tu ungura nouyara wokuritoororera oveni kutja matu tjiti ouwa poo ouvi. Ouyara mbwo u tu pa oruveze rwokuraisa orusuvero rwetu ku Mukuru.—Lesa Jakobus 1:13-15; 1 Johanes 5:3. 3. Ongwaye Mukuru tja yandjera ovandu okumuna ouzeu nga ku nai? Okuza komapirukiriro motjikunino tjaEden, Jehova wa isa ovandu ve pirukire ousemba we womananeno. Omena ratjike? Okuveraisira kutja ozongondjero zawo zokurihonaparera oveni kaze nouwa kangamwa mbu maze eta. (Omuzuvarise 7:29; 8:9) Kombunda yozombura 6 000, omakuruhungi wovandu ye raisa oukahu kutja kave nouwa mbu ve rietera. Ovandu mbe nana va urwa okuisapo ovita, ozondjito zoutwe, ouhasemba nomitjise.—Lesa Jeremia 10:23; Ovaroma 9:17. Ouhona waMukuru wa panguka ku imbwi wovandu, orondu owo u yandja ouwa ku imba mbe u yakura. (Jesaja 48:17, 18) Moruyaveze rwopopezu, Jehova ma isapo ozohoromende zovandu azehe. Ovandu mba yakura omananeno waMukuru porwawo ombu mave kahupa kombanda yehi.—Jesaja 11:9.—Lesa Daniel 2:44. 4. Omuretima waMukuru u tu pa oruveze rwokutjita tjike? Satan wa tja ovandu katjave karera Jehova andakuzu kave nouwa mbu ve muna mo. Ove ko nakuvanga okuraisa kutja ihi tjiri otjizeze? Mo yenene okutjita nao, orondu omuretima waMukuru u tu pa oruveze rwokuraisa kutja tu vanga okuhonaparerwa i Ye poo i ovandu. Omuano mbu tu hupa ombu raisa kutja eṱe tu ri munda uṋe.—Lesa Job 1:8-12; Omiano 27:11. 5. Matu yenene okutoorora vi Mukuru otjOmunane wetu? Eṱe matu yenene okutoorora Mukuru otjOmunane wetu indu tji twe rihongo natu ungurisa ongamburiro youatjiri ndja zikamena kEmbo raMukuru, Ombeibela. (Johanes 4:23) Matu yenene okupirukira ouhonapare waSatan indu tji twe riṱizire kokure noviṋa vyopolitika novita otja Jesus tjaa tjiti.—Lesa Johanes 17:14. Satan u ungurisa omasa we okumunikisa ozongaro ozombi zomeritjindiro novitjitwa ovivi aayo oviwa. Eṱe tji twa nakaura ovitjitwa mbyo, omapanga poo ovazamumwe vetu mape ya ave tu pirukire nokutuhungira navi. (1 Petrus 4:3, 4) Okutja matu sokutoorora kutja matu kara puna ovandu mba suvera Mukuru poo indee? Matu ṱakamisa omatwako we worusuvero nounongo poo indee? Tji twa tjiti nao, eṱe matu raisa kutja Satan wa kora ovizeze indu tja tja kape nomundu ngu ma ṱakama ku Mukuru indu tje ri mouzeu.—Lesa 1 Ovakorinte 6:9, 10; 15:33. Orusuvero rwaMukuru kovandu ondu kwizika kutja ourunde nokumuna omauzeu maku yanda. Imba mbe raisa kutja ve kambura moviṋa mbi mave kayorokera omuinyo kombanda yehi nga aruhe.—Lesa Johanes 3:16.

OTJOMUISE- Kapeyakara ondaze kotjiveta posya mapemunika ayo kuna okandinina kokurwe ngwina komerihekeneno wozombara zOvaherero nOvambanderu novimbumba vyarwe vyopendje nohoromende ohunga nOmbongarero yOtjiwa¿a yEhi Oitjavari ndjimaihaama omweze mbumauyende omayuva tjiyeri 1-5. Tjiyari 14 komweze imbwi ovimbumba imbi otjivyahndire orutuu koministera ondenga, Saara Kuugongelwa-Amadhila, nguri omuhaamise wombongarero indji muvya raisire ongendo nouzeu wavyo ohunga nozohaviho peke peke zomasembamisiro wombongarero yehi indji. Muwo muna nu mbivyatjere ondjiri oongendo onenenene, muna kokutja “ombongarero indji kaina kutoora otjina jtehi rotjizeero komutima mena rokutja ehi orjtizeero karimwe romapu omahungirirwa momapu warwe wotjikoro nu munao otjiriheri epu romapu ozongunde”. Tjarwe wina otjimbumba ihi tjaraisa ouzeu watjo nonduri nomuhapo wokomiti ohoromende orongerise yombongarero indji nomwano mbuyasembamisiwa. Tjinene vaningirire kutja okomiti indji, ndjimaitjiukwa otjokomiti yokombanda, ikare nomaunguriro ngeri poruhaera naihapatere ovandu tjiva pendje. Mavetja omatoororero noma¿angero wovahaame mombongarero indji kayena ovika¿eno ovikahuke kutja oune ngwanangwa nuwanangerwa tjike nu kwatarewa kutjike kutja ma¿angwe. Tjingetjo ovimbumba imbi vyayendekere kokutja otutuu twozongumeno vaimba mbayekwa omahi katupa tworutuu rombongarero indji. Wina omatyasaneno ngari mouparanga wehi motukondwa kayeyenene nu kayari omaparanga pupeÞapi tjinga oyo ayayandera movihuro vyotukondwa uriri nayehavaza komaturiro wokozombanda owo kukuturira otjingi tjovandu kozombada mbapandjara ehi. Kehi yovinenge imbi ovimbumba imbi otjivyaningirire kokutja ovinenge avihe imbi mbyatamunuwa komurungu imba vi¿unwe. Pendje na nao vyaningirire kutja vepewe orutuu rondjivisiro aihe ohnga naimba mbahandurisiwa okuza kongutukiro komurungu wombongarero yehi. Vyatjere mapemunika ayo otjingi tjovanangwa kombongarero indji ozoministera novaungure vohoromende varwe munao otjeri ohepero kokutja omanangero inga yehendekere kwimba mbapandjara ehi. Omauhonapare wombazu otjoutjevere waimba mbapandjara ehi maiso okukuramenwapo pupayenene motutu aruhe peke peke otutie twombongarero indji. Wina omatjangwa notutuu twozongurameno zomauhonapare wozombazu woviwa¿a mbyapandjara ehi maviso okukakuramenwapo pombongarero yehi iyovatjiwe vyavyo. Orutuu oruseinina romapu omahungirirwa pombogarero indji maruso okuhandjaurwa ape oviveke vivari komurungu wombongarero indji ku avehe mbenoruopa muyo kutja owo verukonÿonone nu tjeri ohepero verurundurure. Ovimbumba vyatjere epu rehi rakutwa kuna OtjiÞiro Otjindjandja ookatama neyo nu munao otjipehasere okuhingirira kehi nokuhina okutwa otjihungiriro ihi meho r OtjiÞiro Otjindjandja. Koruseinina onÿero yovimbumba imbi kutja komayandero wayo ombongarero yehi indji ikare nongutiro ongunÿe womausemba womakotorero wehi rotjizeero amavitjia ombongarero yo 1991 kainaindu yanakaura ehi rotjizeero kaparukaze nungwari yaraisa uriri kokutja ouzeu okukotora ehi rotjizeero arihe, mena rokutja ehi arihe rotjizeero rionvengi mberirarakana mbetja orao. Ovimbumba imbi mavitja imbwi kauzeu mbwasere okutjaera ehi rotjizeero kaparukaze tjinga apena omyano omingi peke peke okwiisira nokutarera komahi yarwe mouye omwano mbuyaungura nepu tjingero.

I Wezi Tjaronda OTJOMUISE – Ovature vo mahi wa kangamwa vena ozombura zarwe ndatu oku-tjangisa ousemba wowini wao wehi rombazu. O Ministeri yOmahi nOmahandurisiro Oritjavari watjivisire kutja wareparisa oruveze ro meritjangisiro kousemba wowini wehi tjaza nokumuna kutja ngunda pena ovingi mbyasere okuungurwa motjina ihi. O Ministera Jerry Ekandjo wa raerere ounepo wovirata vyomahi wa kanga-mwa motjihuro o hongora ku-tja okuhina okuyenena oku-tjangisa avehe mbasere oku-tjangwa kwatjita kutja ohoro-mende aiha kara nomwano warwe pendje no ku reparisa oruveze ro matjangero oure wozombura zarwe ndatu. Ovature vari noruveze nganduu mo mayandero wa Tengarindi ombura indji o kuritjangisa no kutanaurira ousemba wao wokukara mehi mousemba wokuyazema. Okuza nganda otjiungura ihi a tjauta ozombura ndatu ndakapita ovirata imbi vya-tjanga ovature o 3164 ovaku-ru mbaningira ousemba, ovape e 1028 navi tanaurire ousemba wokukara o 17 mou-semba wokuyazema oma-turiro. Pendje na nao ovirata imbi vya yandjera ovayazeme ovape o 688 ngunda ozondja-kaha o 124 a zarapotua nu 44 muzo a zazengururwa. Na-ndarire mondoneno indji Ekandjo watjere ngunda pena ovingi mbyasere okutjitua mena rokutja ousemba auhe wehi mbunovandu nai wasere kutja wa tjangwa moure wo-zombura ndatu inda ndaka-pitire nai. Mozombubra ndatu nderiko, Ekandjo watjere, ovirata vyehi mbiripo nai vyasere okutjanga omause-mba ayehe wehi nawina oku tanaurira ousemba wokukara mousemba wokuyazema omaturiro. Tjingetjo maviso okutuna nokuzengurura ozombata nderi motukondua tuavyo nokutua Oveta yOma-tungururiro Wehi ra Kanga-mwa momaunguriro okuura. Nombatero yOruwano rwa Eurpa, o Ministeri yOmahi mayiutu otjiungura ovanau-nongo mokusaneka ounene wehi pumavevatere oviwana okurisaneka noku vepan-gurira ousemba wao kutja tja-zumba ovirata vyomahi wa-kangamwa vi ungurireko. Otjiungura ihi tji matjika-mbura ozombura mbari, matji tjiti kutja omaturiro ngeripo nai otja kombazu nawina omayazemeno wehi momahi wa kangamwa, ye tjangisiwe noveni vawo vekare notu tutu tuomatjangisiro wehi rao indi otja kousemba wowini kuveri tjangisa. Ombongarero indji ndjau-tire Omandaha nu ndji maiy-anda ndinondi pena ounepo auhe wovirata vyomahi wa kangamwa o 160. Tjiva zozo-ndando zayo oku okutjiukisa kounepo oupe wovirata imbi Oveta yOmatungururiro wOmahi wa Kangamwa na-wina orutuu oru hongorere rovirata imbi, okuhungirira nokuyeta kotjikoro oveta oitjavari ombungurwa oru-ndurure yOveta yOmatu-ngururiro wEhi ra Kangamwa nawina oku hungirira ko ma-tuiiro momaunguriro wotji-ungura tjo Matjangisiro Wo-mausemba Wehi ra Kanga-mwa Ngeripo nai. Ounepo wovirata ombura ndjazuko otji waraisa mbi mauvanga kutja virire orupa noveta ombungurwa orun-durure tji waningirwa oku-raisa ovinenge mbiheri nawa mOveta. Tjimwe tjavyo ou-nene wehi. Ousemba mbu mauyandjwa kehi yOveta indji ousemba wehi roututa, romaturiro, eyazema nawina ousemba womaungurisiro wehi momwano auhe otja kombazu mbwavarwa no kuhandjaurwa iyo Ministera mongoramambo ondjiukise kotjiveta yovitjitua vyohoro-mende. Oveta yOmatungu-ruriro wEhi itjaera o mana-neno wotumbo momahi wa kangamwa pendje nousemba nawina omarisiro wo vima-mwinyo mbihaturire momahi ingo. Wina itjaere ovatita mbena ovinamwinyo ovinene mbyatanana o 300 novititi vyo kombanda yotjivaro the 1800 okutumbira momahi wa kangamwa. #WEATHER Windhoek,NA light rain 29.4 ° C 30 ° 29 ° 23% 2.6kmh 92% Sun 29 ° Mon 30 ° Tue 26 ° Wed 28 ° Thu 31 °

EHUNGI XXVI. Okutaborua kua Enuhe. Oviu. 8 . Jehora ua hindire omurajeoa ue komundu ena re Viripu, gua tja ku Viripu : Sekama, tuende kon- djira, indjindji ri pokati Jerusarema na pokati Gaza. Viripu ua sekaraene, arire tj’a i ; nu tara ! omundu uehi ra Etiopia ua karere meendise re. Omundu ingui ua rukirue enuke ; e ua ri ombara onene, omukarere omunene ua Kandase, ingungua ri omuhona uehi ra Etiopia. Enuke ua kukire koho- na Jerusarema, kokuningira ku Jehova, ondu ko- kutja mu Jerusarema ondjuo ja Jehova omu ja ri. E ua kotokere gahino, na kara meendise re, arire tj’a tara motjikarurua tjomambo oamuhungirire, ena re Jesaja. Ombepo ua Jehova ua tjere ku Viripu : tuende keendise indi. Viripu arire tj’a utuka, na zuva, enuke kutja ua hungirire omambo motjikarurua tja Jesaja. Viripu arire tj’a tja ko- mundu : mo zuu omambo’nga ? Enuke ua tjere : aje oanga, ami hi na kusora, ka pen omundu, guen dji honge. Arire tj’a tja ku Viripu, ga ronde meendise, kokukara pumuna je. Nu va hungirire motjikarurua omambo’nga : E ua eterue pomazepero otj’ ontu ; otj’ ondjona ka patururire otjinjo tje komurungu uomuzepe. E ua isirue momitjise ; oune, gu ma kora otukuato tue ; omuinjo ue mau isiua kehi. Enuke arire tj’a tja ku Viripu : arikana, dji raera okuha komambo’nga. Nu Viripu ua patururire otjinjo tje, arire tj’e mu kora ehungi ra Jesu ; Jesu, kutja eje ondjona ja Erohima, indjindja isa ko ozondjo zouje. Nu tji va endere nai mondjira, ve ere pomeva. Enuke ua tjere ku Viripu : tara, omeva omue ri, ba tje- verua na tjike kokutaborua? Viripu ua tjere: tji mo kampura nomutima auhe, mo sora. Enuke ua zirire, na tja : me kampura, Jesu Mesia, kutja eje omatje o Erohima. Na tja korakarere re, eendise gari kurame. Navevari, Viripu na enuke, va raukire momeva, nu Viripu arire tj’a tabora enuke. Tji va rondere momeva, Ombepo ua Jehova ua isire po Viripu, Enuke ka munu je rukuao ; e ua endere nenjando ondjira je. — Eimp. ix. Jehova , ove omuhona uetu. Ove ua tjitire ouje auhe novandu avehe novina avihe. Ove u nomasa omanene notjari otjinene. Ete matu danka hove, kutja ue tu pere embo roje ratjiri, nu matu ningire hove: kampurisa ete atuhe omambo ooje. Matu danka kove, kutja ove ue tu pere omukoateua uoje erike , kutja auhe , ga ma kampura mu je, a ha pan - jara, nunguari ga hare nokuhupa ku ha janda. Tu pa o ondjerera ja Ombepo uoje , tu pa o ongambui jatjiri, a tu ha panjara. Zeisa ozondjo zetu ozo- nene, koh omitima vietu nompintu ja Jesu, omatje uoje, nu tu pa o omitima omipe, kora notjari hom~ banda jetu, nu kombanda Ovaherero avehe. Amen. f ' . > • * j V*

I Kae Matundu-Tjiparuro OTJOMUISE Ohoro-mende ina ondando yo ku-hana ehi mo utukondi wo mekurisiro wo mbwiko mo zoresevate mo kutunduuza no kunyomokisa ovitjitua vyo mbwiko. Otjorupa rotjiungura ihi ohoromende o tjiina ondando yo kutunga ozondjira nov-yungurisiwa vyarwe otjo tjirondero tjomekurisiro omakarerere wombwiko. Presidenda Hifikepunye Pohamba watjere nao mehungi re po mazem-burukiro oetja 16 wongu-tukiro ya Namibia Oritjavari muno. Okuvatera omitanda Ombonganisiro yOmitanda vyo Tjiwana wina ya raerwa okuhipika otjiungura tjayo nokuwondjoza omitanda omingi oku virongerisa mo-tupa peke peke. Owatjiri orupa indui rwauta rukuru notjiungura tjoku hupika omitanda. Tjivya tji vyamana mavi undjirwa oku kapitisa ondji-viro ko mitanda vyarwe kutja otjiungura tjorupa ro mitanda tjirire otji kare rere. Vyarwe mavi undjirwa oku hita motjitamba tjomb-wiko kutja omo horomende poo omo zonganda za peke. Otjina tjarwe ongendo onene ko horomende oma panginino wo vakazendu. “Owatjiri kutja tuamema nokutua mo maunguriro ozo-veta ozo ndjurure zo zom-bangu nda ihamisa ova-kazendu vetu mo huurire yorukapita veze. “Ngunda aperi nao ami mekambura kutja tuso okutoora omikambo vyo tji-vara oku pangina ova-kazendu vetu oku tuurungira mo vitjitua mbiripo nai tji-muna vyo matungururiro wehi, omavaterero wo zon-getjefa ozonditi nozo pokati na wina oku hupika ozon-gondjero zo mekurisiro ndu mazeyandjere ovakazendu okunana ozongogetjefa no vitjitua ovinjikore vyotji-mariva nondoneno.” Presidenda Pohamba watjere o horomende ma i kayenda komurngu okutara kondjuriro yo vakurundu oku kondja okuyeneneka ouhepe wawo. Wina ma i kaondja no tjiungura tjoku nyomokisa ombwiro yo vaungure no kukurisa ondunge yepango pokati kayo, ovaungurise no vaungure. Tjiya tjiti nao oyo ma i yeta ohange motji tamba tjo maunguriro wovina notjo atjirire otjina vihape. Kutja veyenene okutum-bisa ehi ovature varo vasere okurira ova veruke. Ihi matjihee kutja vasere oku-kara nomapangero ngaye-nene ngumaye yandjwa momwano omusore no muna vihape. Watjere orupa ro u veruke rwa kuramenwa iyo tjipwite otjinene tjitjiri Ondui yEhin-ga nEhinga. Ngunda otjipwite ihi atjiri otjinene wina ongondjero yohoromende okutjivirura mondjira onamasa. Oyo ya zikamisa otjiun-gura tjomiti omi pupareke vyo mutjise imbwi nawina vyokutja ounatje a u hatoora omutjise imbwi okuza koo ina. Otjiungura ihi tjika yenda potuveze otuingi tuozondan-da zo u veruke mehi. Posyo kutja ongondjero indji ikare novihape oruveze orure pena ondando yo kwii tandavarisa kovature varwe mehi. Nungwari ondando indji yasere oku kayenda ombam-ba no rukosi roku tjiukisa omutjise imbwi kotjiwana, tjinene nene komitanda. Mu-nao o Presidenda otji yanin-girire otjiwana oku rikuta ko horomende noku rwisa omutjise imbwi omwano mburiwo. Watjere eye una ongam-buriro kutja ehi rasere oku kara no vikurya vyaro orini otjo rupa ro mekurisiro. Munao Orutu Rotjiungura Tjoruhapo (Green Scheme Agency) otji rwa zikamisiwa otjo rupa rongondjero indji no tjiungura tjoku nyomokisa omakunino wo vikunwa peke peke mene yo zon-dondu ndeha nono kutja ovature ve ryungurire ovi kurya. Otjo tjiungura tjapeke nu tjitja tjama no ngondjero indji, ovatuta vondondo onditi vehupikwa otjo vatuta vo vikurya mberi kuramena. O horomende i tunduuza ovatuta vo ndondo onditi na-wina vo mahi wapeke okuka-ra norupa mo tjiungura ihi.

Oo kana kekara toho mena kutja ketjiwa kutjavi oo konganda kupi mena rokutja ombwa puyakamuna okutumbwa omwano warwe pumaitumbwa ousemba ombwa ndjo mai tjindi okuza poyoye aikakaa poyomundu ngo mara tjiwatara okambihi oko makena uriri owo okana korusuvero noho tjiuno mwihamwatima warara mombete monamo katjorive wekwesa poo wazepaisa poo iye konoo uno mwihamwatima okambihi makekaa monamo makekurara mombete kunaove popezu yoye uriri oo okana noho okana okawa uriri toho tjiu tjimona pona mbo tjimezu kutjanao metaa kutja taa tjimuna pari otjikando tate wandje tjaza nokuta papa wandje tjaza nokuta tjandje tuno tjandje mbino mwihamwatima okaa kuno kambihi kandje uriri okambihi kari mitsi, mitsi eeya ponambo eekurara mombete kunaami tjimbazire koskole handje hina kufula nawa meyanga okurira poo meriri akekurara andae makekurara pezumo randje poo kekurara potjari mehee uriri o otjina kutja mbwae mbiri mba mbiri kunaove turi pamwe oove otjina tjimbasuvera ohunga noumbihi.

Otjomuise Ohoromende yehi rOvandoitji no ya Namibia za kayenda okapaze komurungu oku zuvasana kembo indi “OtjiÞiro Otjindjandja”. O Ministera yOngaro Pokati Komahi nOmaunguriro Kumwe, wina nguri o Ministera Ondenga yOkehi, Netumbo Nandi-Ndaitwah, wa raerere o New Era mehungi rapeke kuna ongora mambo indji. Ongoramambo indji yahinda orutuu ro mapuriro otuwondja oku kondja okuzuva okuza motjinyo tjo horomende oini kutja tjii hapo ko tutavi twomiti kuzuvaka omambo wo kutja pena otjihungiriro pokati ko zo horomende azeembari inda mo TjiÞiro Otjindjandja, owo tjinene ngezira okuza munda wOvandoitji nu tjii hapo ohoromenda ya Namibia itjavi kuwo? Tjingetjo ongoramambo indji ya vanga okuzuva kohoromende kutja pena omazuvira wokutja ohoromende yOvandoitji yautu okwiitavera kOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja nu tjii hapo omambo inga yena owatjiri mbuÞapi? Komautiro wehungi indi omutjange ingwi wa vangere okuzuva mu Netumbo-Ndaitwah otjomundu mo horomende ngunana oruhindo rohoromende ya Namibia motjihungiriro ihi kutja hapo otjo tjiri pena otjihungiriro ihi. Eye wayauzire kutja otjo tjiri opu tjikara. “Nandarire mba hakayena noruhindo rOvandoitji ndwa hindwa iyo horomende yOvandoitji, mbahungira mongoze kuno wotjihako tjingee tjandje wOvandoitji, Onongo Frank-Walter Steinmeier nawina omukuramenepo wehi rOvandoitji, Onno Huckmann,” Netumbo-Ndaitwah matja. Posya watja nai eye kena ku ngunda amahiti oukoto mo ndimwa yo tjihungiriro ihi neye mayenene oku handjaura tjazu no ku kwambera ko o Kambineta. Komrungu omutjange ingwi wa vangere oku zuva kutja otja ko ma zuvira tjimwe tjo tji hunguriro itji irira kutja omahi ayeyevari inga yeute oku hungira eraka rimwe mepu rOtjiÞiro Ondjandja eraka rimwe indi ndi torokwa otjokutja opomba ohoromende yehi rOvandoitji pwiivanga kutja embo indi Otjitiro Otjindjandja ari ha tamunwa nu tji hapo koma torokero inga ohoromende ya Namibia umunako vi? Nandi-Ndaitwah matja itji kaye oku petia mena ro kutja eye kanguri ohoromende nandarire kutja otjo tjiri eye omukuramenepo wayo. Posya otjiungura the okuhara noku wongera pamwe ondjivisiro aihe ohepero no kwii kapitisa ko Kambineta oyo aihe pamwe okutoora ondiero okwiisira kondjivisiro indji. Okuzambo ovina tjiviazu no ku kahuka otji marire nawa ohoromende oku kara no mu hunga wo harive. Matja pakara ombaze komurungu mo tjina ihi nugwari eye mayenene oku hungirira kuyo kombunda tjazu no ku kwambera ko o Kambineta. Tjapurwa kutja nu tjii hapo ongurameno yo horomende ya Namibia kemerizirira woruveze rohuurire wo horomende yOvandoitji nu tjinene okutara mo TjiÞiro Otjindjandja no Tjisuta okwiisira kongutiro yOmbongarero yOzoveta yo 2006? Nandi-Ndaitwah rukwao watja o Kambineta porwe ondji maiyenene okutoora ondiero yonguramene yohoromende. Nandi-Ndaitwah tja purwa kutja tjii hapo oviwana mbyaihamwa motji hungiriro ihi vizemurukwa, matja ohoromende ya Namibia ikambura mo ku hina okupatera karive pendje. Eye nai okura notjiungura tjo ku zuva ominda aviyevari motjina ihi neye kenee pezuu kutja ongwaye owo tjive hasere oku kara norupa. Tjapurwa ko kutja ohoromende ya Namibia kutja tjii hapo oviwana imbi ivi tjivisa kutja pena ombaze komurungu poo kaipo, matja itji ngunda otjitjitwa tjoviposa vyopendje okuza kohoromende imwe kuyarwe. Posya karure ma kwambere ko o Kambineta kutja omo tjiveke poo oviveke vivari nu kombunda ya nao otji ma veyenene oku tjivisa otjiwa¿a. Komambo nga ingana tjinene ngeza kehi rOvandoitji ohunga nokwiitavera kutja mbya tjitwa mo 1904 OtjiÞiro Otjindjandja, matja ndoovazu pakara nao marire otjina otjiwa posyo kutja okuzambo pasere okutjitwa tjike kaye okupetia.

ETJANGWA ROMBURA NDJI 2021: “Omasa weṋu maye zu mokuporimana na mokuriyameka.”—JES. 30:15. EIMBURIRO 3 Omasa wetu, omaundjiro wetu, ongamburiro yetu OMAPU KU MATU KATARA* 1. Ovikeṋa mbi matu yenene okuningira tjimuna Ombara David? EṰE atuhe tu zera okuhupa ehupo rohange. Kape nomundu ngu kara nondjoroka indu tje ri mombameno. Oruveze rumwe mape ya tu kondja nomauzeu nge tu kendisa. Otjiperi kutja, ovakarere va Jehova tjiva mape ya ve pura omapuriro Ombara David nga pura ku Jehova. Eye wa pura kutja, “Hi tjinde ouzeu momuinyo wandje orure nai nga ruṋe? Hi kare noruhoze momutima wandje ouṱuku nomutenya nga ruṋe?”—Eps. 13:2. 2. Matu kahungirira ku ye morupa ndwi? 2 Nandarire kutja eṱe povikando tjiva tu kara nomeripura nge tu kendisa, matu yenene okuritjaera komeripura ngo. Morupa ndwi matu katara koviṋa tjiva mbi tjita kutja tu rikende. Okuzambo matu kahungirira komiano hamboumwe mbi mavi tu vatere okutjinda omauzeu wetu noupore. OVIKEṊA MBI TJITA KUTJA TU RIKENDE? 3. Ovikeṋa mbi tjita kutja tu rikende nu matu yenene okuviyepa vi? 3 Pe noviṋa ovingi mbi tu kendisa nu eṱe kamaatu yenene okuvitjaera. Otjotjihorera, eṱe kamaatu yenene okutjaera omuano opereisa yovikurya, ozombanda nozondjuwo mu vi yerurukira ko ombura aihe. Nu wina kamaatu yenene okutjaera omuano imba mbu tu ungura pamwe poo mbu tu hita pamwe oskole mu ve tu popa okukora ovizeze poo okutjita oruvakiro. Nu eṱe kamaatu yenene okutjaera ozondjito ozombi kutja aze ha tjitwa momaturiro wetu. Eṱe tu muna omauzeu ngo mena rokutja tu hupa mouye ovandu ovengi mu ve ha hupu otja komirari vyOmbeibela. Satan, mukuru omurunde wouye mbwi, u tjiwa kutja ovandu tjiva mave isa okukarera Jehova mena ‘romerikendero wouye mbwi.’ (Mat. 13:22; 1 Joh. 5:19) Kunao eṱe katu temisiwa i yomauzeu wouye mbwi nge tjita kutja ovandu ve rikende. 4. Ovikwaye mbi mape ya a vi tjitwa indu omauzeu wetu tji ya utu okutukendisa tjinene? 4 Eṱe mape ya atu rikende ohunga nomauzeu wetu nga tji tu hi nokuripura notjiṋa tjarwe. Otjotjihorera, mape ya atu rikende kutja kamaatu munu ovimariva mbya yenene okuranda oviṋa mbi matu hepa. Poo atu rikende kutja tji twa vere kamaatu i koviungura poo matu pandjara oviungura vyetu. Nu wina mape ya atu rikende kutja kamaatu yenene okurira ovaṱakame tji twa rorwa okuteya omatwako wa Mukuru. Moruveze rwa tjimanga Satan ma ungurisa imba mbe ri kehi ye okurwisa ovakarere va Mukuru. Mape ya atu rikende kutja matu tjiti vi indu tja tjiti nao. Poo atu ripura kutja, ‘Hapo onavi okurikenda ohunga noviṋa mbyo?’ 5. Hapo Jesus a hee tjike indu tja tja: ‘Amu rikende’? 5 Matu tjiwa kutja Jesus wa raera ovemukongorere kutja, ‘Amu rikende.’ (Mat. 6:25) Hapo Jesus a hee kutja katu sokurikendera otjiṋa? Kako! Zemburuka kutja moruveze orukuru ovakarere va Jehova ovaṱakame aave rikende wina, posi yokutja eye wa ri nonyuṋe mu wo.* (1 Ozomb. 19:4; Eps. 6:3) Otjiperi kutja Jesus u tu huhumiṋa nomambo ngo. Eye ka vanga kutja tu rikende ohunga noviṋa mbi matu hepa nga tji tu hi nokumuna kutja okukarera Jehova otji tji ri otjiṋa otjinanḓengu tjinene mehupo retu. Matu yenene okutjita vi indu tji matu rikende?—Lesa okaonga nga “Oviṋa mbi mo yenene okutjita.” OVIṊA HAMBOUMWE MBI MAVI TU VATERE OKUPORIMANA 6. Otja kOvafilipi 4:6, 7, otjikeṋa tji matji tu vatere okuporimana tji tu nozongendo? 6 (1) Kumba aruhe. Indu tji u nouzeu mbu mau ku kendisa, mo yenene okukumba ku Jehova kutja me ku vatere. (1 Petr. 5:7) Jehova ma yenene okuzuvira ozongumbiro zoye mokukupa ‘ohange ndja kapita ozondunge azehe zovandu.’ (Lesa Ovafilipi 4:6, 7.) Jehova me ku pe ohange ndjo okupitira mombepo ye ondjapuke onamasa.—Gal. 5:22. 7. Otjikeṋa tji matu sokuzemburuka tji matu kumbu ku Mukuru? 7 Indu tji mo kumbu ku Jehova mu raera oviṋa avihe mbi mavi ku kendisa. Mu raera ohunga nouzeu mbu u nawo nu mu kahururira kutja mau ku kendisa pu pe ṱa pi. Ouzeu mbwo tji mau yenene okuzengururwa, mu ningira ounongo mbu mau ku vatere okuuzengurura. Nu tji u hi nokuyenena okuzengurura ouzeu mbwo, ningira Jehova me ku vatere kutja o he rikende tjinene. Indu tji wa raere Jehova oviṋa avihe, otja oruveze tji maru kayenda ove mo utu okumuna omuano Jehova ma zira ozongumbiro zoye. Indu eziriro tji u heri mwine tjimanga, o yumbu ohama. Jehova u vanga kutja u mu raere avihe nu wina u kayende komurungu okukumba.—Luk. 11:8-10. 8. Ovikeṋa mbi matu sokutamuna mozongumbiro zetu? 8 Otja tji mo raere ozongendo zoye ku Jehova mongumbiro, raisa ondangi wina. Onawa okuripura ohunga noviṋa oviwa mbi tu navyo, nandarire kutja tu muna omauzeu omengi. Nu hapo ove mo yenene okutjita vi indu tji u hi nokutjiwa okuraera Jehova oviṋa mbi mavi ku kendisa momuinyo? Zemburuka kutja Jehova ma ziri ongumbiro yoye nandarire tji wa tja ‘Ndji vatera!’—2 Ekuruh. 18:31; Rom. 8:26. 9. Matu sokutjita vi indu tji matu tira? 9 (2) Riyameka kounongo wa Jehova, o riyameke ku imbi mbi mo nangarasi motjiwa. Meserewondo oritjahambondatu K.O.Z., ovandu va Juda aave tira Ovaasirie. Nu mena romerihahiziro nokukondja kutja ave ha huurwa i Ovaasirie, owo va ka paha ombatero kOvaengipte. (Jes. 30:1, 2) Jehova we ve rakiza kutja okuriyameka kOvaengipte ombandjarero. (Jes. 30:7, 12, 13) Okupitira mu Jesaja, Jehova we ve raera omuano mu mave munu ondjeverero yatjiri. Eye wa tja: “Omasa weṋu maye zu mokuporimana na mokuriyameka” ku Jehova.—Jes. 30:15. 10. Omomiano viṋe mu matu yenene okuriyameka ku Jehova? 10 Omomiano viṋe mu matu yenene okuriyameka ku Jehova? Ngatu tare kovihorera tjiva. Ngatu tje wa munu oviungura mbi mavi sutu nawa, posi yokutja mavi hepa kutja u ungure ozoiri ozengi nu kavi nokukupa oruveze okuungurira Jehova tjimuna tji u tjita. Poo pe nomundu ngu mu ungura pamwe ngu ku vanga, posi yokutja kamukarere wa Mukuru ngwa papitisiwa. Poo mo tjiti vi indu okaṋepo keṱunḓu roye tji ka tja, tji wa kayenda komurungu okukarera Jehova me ku nakaura? Mozongaro azehe ozonḓeu nḓo, ove mo hepa okutoora omukambo. Posi yokutja, Jehova me ku pe omuhunga mbu mo hepa. (Mat. 6:33; 10:37; 1 Kor. 7:39) Epuriro orondi rokutja, Hapo mo riyameke ku Jehova nokukara nonḓuviro komuhunga mbwe ku pe? 11. Ovihorera viṋe vyOmbeibela mbi mavi tu vatere okuporimana indu tji matu pirukirwa? 11 (3) Rihongera kovihorera oviwa novivi. Ombeibela i novihorera ovingi mbi raisa ounanḓengu wokukayenda komurungu okuporimana nokuriyameka ku Jehova. Otja tji mokonḓonona ovihorera mbyo, ripura ohunga nokutja ovikwaye mbya vatera ovakarere va Mukuru okuporimana nandarire kehi yomapirukiro omazeu. Otjotjihorera, indu otjombanguriro tjotjira tjOvajuda tji tja tjaera ovaapostele okuzuvarisa, owo kaave tira. Posi yokutja, va hungira nouvanḓe kutja, “Omundu wa sokukara nonḓuviro ku Ndjambi komeho yokukara nonḓuviro kovandu.” (Oviung. 5:29) Nandarire kombunda yokutonwa, ovaapostele kaave tira. Omena raye? Mena rokutja owo aave tjiwa kutja Jehova u ri munda wawo, nu u nonyuṋe mu wo. Kunao, va kayenda komurungu okuzuvarisa ombuze ombwa. (Oviung. 5:40-42) Nu wina, omuhongewa Stefanus ngunda e hiya ṱa, wa kayenda komurungu okukara nohange nu omurungu we aau munika “otja omurungu womuengeli.” (Oviung. 6:12-15) Omena raye tja ri nohange? Mena rokutja aa tjiwa kutja Jehova wari nonyuṋe mu ye. 12. Otja 1 Petrus 3:14 nekondwa 4:14, ongwaye tji matu yenene okukara nondjoroka indu tji matu tatumisiwa? 12 Ovaapostele va ri noviraisiro kutja Jehova wa ri puna wo. Eye we ve pa omasa okutjita ovihimise. (Oviung. 5:12-16; 6:8) Nungwari Jehova ndino ke tupe omasa okutjita ovihimise. Posi yokutja, okupitira mEmbo re, Jehova u tu raera kutja tji twa tatumisirwa ousemba eye u ri puna eṱe nu me tupe ombepo ye ondjapuke. (Lesa 1 Petrus 3:14; 4:14.) Kunao, eṱe katu sokurikenda ohunga nondatumisire ndji matu kamuna moruyaveze nungwari matu sokupamisa ongamburiro yokutja Jehova ma kara puna eṱe nu me tu yama. Tjimuna ovahongewa tji va tjita, eṱe wina matu sokuzemburuka omakwizikiro wa Jesus nga: “Ami me mu pe omambo nounongo kutja ape ha ningi omunavita na eṋe nangarire umwe ngu me mu pata momambo poo ngu ma pirukire imbi mbi mamu hungire.” Jesus wetu kwizikira kutja, “Panḓereye po, nu indino otji mamu yama omiinyo vyeṋu.” (Luk. 21:12-19) Nu ngatu zemburuke kutja Jehova u zemburuka oviṋa avihe ohunga novakarere ve ovaṱakame mba ṱa. Nu iho tji tjita kutja ma yenene okuvependura. 13. Matu rihongere ko ye kovihorera vya imba mbe hina va kayenda komurungu okuporimana nokuriyameka ku Jehova? 13 Eṱe wina matu rihongere kovihorera vya imba mbe hina va kayenda komurungu okuporimana nokuriyameka ku Jehova. Mokukonḓonona ovihorera ovivi mbyo maku tu vatere kutja atu ha tjiti ozondataiziro owo nḓu va tjita. Otjotjihorera, Ombara yOvajuda Asa we riyamekere ku Jehova indu otjimbumba otjinene tjovarwe wovita wOvaetopi tji tje ve rwisa nu Jehova we mu sera ondaya na taara. (2 Ekuruh. 14:9-12) Kombunda, indu Ombara yOvaisrael Basa tja rwisa Asa notjimbumba otjiṱiṱi tjovarwe wovita, eye ke riyamekere ku Jehova tjimuna tja tjitire. Nungwari wa suta otjimbumba tjovita tja Sirie okumuvatera. (2 Ekuruh. 16:1-3) Nu kuṱa komaandero womuinyo we indu tja verere tjinene, eye ke riyamekere ku Jehova.—2 Ekuruh. 16:12. 14. Matu rihongere ye kozondataiziro za Asa? 14 Asa rutenga wa paha ombatero ya Jehova indu tja muna ouzeu. Posi yokutja, kombunda eye ke riyamekere ku Mukuru okumuvatera. Nungwari wa kondja okuzengurura omauzeu we omuini. Indu Asa tja ningira ombatero okuza kOvasirie okurwisa Ovaisrael, mape ya poutenga aape munika tjimuna omukambo mbwa toora mau toṋa. Posi yokutja, Ovajuda kave karere nohange oure woruveze orure. Jehova wa hungira kuna ye okupitira momuprofete na tja: “Ove tjinga awe riyameka kombara ya Sirie moruveze rwokuriyameka ku Muhona, Ndjambi woye, otjimbumba tjovita tjombara ya Sirie otji tja hena kove.” (2 Ekuruh. 16:7, NW) Eṱe matu sokukengeza kutja atu ha munu kutja matu yenene okuzengurura omauzeu wetu oveni, nokuhina okupaha omuhunga okuza ku Jehova okupitira mEmbo re. Nandarire kutja matu sokutoora omukambo wa tjimanga, eṱe matu sokuporimana nokuriyameka ku Jehova, nu eye me tu vatere okutoora omukambo omusemba. 15. Ovikwaye mbi matu yenene okutjita indu tji matu lese Ombeibela? 15 (4) Zemburuka Omatjangwa motjiuru. Indu tji we rihaka komazeva wOmbeibela ngu maye raisa ounahepero wokuporimana nokuriyameka ku Jehova, kondja okuyezemburuka. Ove mo yenene okuyelesa kotjinyo poo okuyetjanga nokuyelesa povikando ovingi. Josua wa rakiziwa okulesa embo rOmatwako aruhe nokuripurira ko oukoto kokutja ma toore omikambo nounongo. Imbi mbyaa lese mOmatwako aavi sokumuvatera kutja aha tira nungwari ma kare nouvanḓe okuhongorera ovakarere va Mukuru. (Jos. 1:8, 9) Omazeva omengi mOmbeibela maye yenene okutuvatera kutja tu porimane, indu tji tu ri mozongaro nḓu maze tu kendisa poo nḓu maze tu pe emuma.—Eps. 27:1-3; Omiano 3:25, 26. 16. Omomuano uṋe Jehova me ungurisa ombongo okutuvatera okuporimana nokuriyameka ku ye? 16 (5) Kara pu novakarere va Mukuru. Jehova u ungurisa ovakambure ovakwetu okutuvatera okuporimana nokuriyameka ku ye. Pozombongarero zetu zombongo tu muna ouwa okuza komahungi nge yandjwa i ovarumendu ovakambure, omaziriro nge yandjwa, na indu tji matu hungire oviṋa oviyanḓiparise pu novakambure ovakwetu. (Hebr. 10:24, 25) Nu wina tu yenena okuyanḓiparisiwa indu tji twa raere omapanga wopopezu mombongo oviṋa mbi mavi tu kendisa. “Embo rouwa” okuza kepanga mari yenene okutuvatera kutja atu he rikende tjinene.—Omiano 12:25. 17. Otja kOvaheberi 6:19, omomuano uṋe omaundjiro wetu ohunga nOuhona wa Mukuru mu maye tu vatere okuporimana nandarire kehi yozongaro ozonḓeu? 17 (6) Kara nomaundjiro omazikame. Omaundjiro wetu wOuhona wa Mukuru ye ri “otja otjihande tjomuinyo,” tji tji tu vatera kutja tu zikame nandarire tji tu ri momauzeu poo kehi yozongaro nḓu maze tu kendisa. (Lesa Ovaheberi 6:19.) Ripura ohunga nomakwizikiro wa Jehova woruyaveze mu mu hi nokukakara omerikendero. (Jes. 65:17) Nu wina ripura ohunga nouye oupe wohange mu mu hi nokutjitwa oviṋa ovivi. (Mika 4:4) Ove wina mo pamisa omaundjiro woye indu tji wa raere varwe ohunga nouye oupe. Kondja okuungura pu mo yenene motjiungura tjokuzuvarisa nokukaisapo ovandu ovahongewa. Indu tji wa tjiti nao ove ‘mo panḓere pongondjero yoye nga komaandero, nokutja oviṋa mbi u undja mavi yenenisiwa.’—Hebr. 6:11. 18. Omauzeu yeṋe ngu matu yenene okuundjira ko moruyaveze, nu matu yenene vi okutuurunga? 18 Mena rokutja tu ri komaandero wouye mbwi, matu munu omauzeu omengi ngu mape ya aye tu kendisa. Etjangwa retu rombura ndji 2021 ma ri tu vatere okutjinda omauzeu ngo nokuporimana, nu ka nomasa wetu oveni posi yokutja omokuriyameka ku Jehova. Momakayendero womburas ngatu raise movitjitwa kutja tu nongamburiro momakwizikiro wa Jehova nga: “Omasa weṋu maye zu mokuporimana na mokuriyameka.”—Jes. 30:15. EIMBURIRO 8 Jehova omaundiro wetu Etjangwa rombura ndji 2021 ma ri hungirire kounanḓengu wokuriyameka ku Jehova otja tji matu tjindi ozombameno nai na moruyavaze. Orupa ndwi maru kahungirira koviṋa mbi matu yenene okutjita okuṱakamisa etjangwa rombura. Ovakambure tjiva ovaṱakame ve rikenda tjinene poo ve kara nomburuma. Omerikendero ngo ye ṱuna kouveruke wawo nungwari ingo kamerikendero Jesus ngaa hungire. OMAKAHURURIRO WOTJIPERENDERO: (1) Eyuva arihe ndwo, omukazendu omukambure ma kumbire omerikendero we. OMAKAHURURIRO WOTJIPERENDERO: (2) Oiri yomariro wometaha ngunda eri poviungura, eye ma konḓonona Embo ra Mukuru kutja ma mune mo ounongo. OMAKAHURURIRO WOTJIPERENDERO: (3) Eye me ripurire ko oukoto kovihorera oviwa novivi mbi ri mOmbeibela. OMAKAHURURIRO WOTJIPERENDERO: (4) Eye ma twako etjangwa eyanḓiparise koiskasa ndi ma vanga okurihonga motjiuru. OMAKAHURURIRO WOTJIPERENDERO: (5) Eye u nondjoroka pu nomapanga omawa motjiungura tjokuzuvarisa. OMAKAHURURIRO WOTJIPERENDERO: (6) Eye ma pamisa omaundjiro we mokuripura ohunga noruyaveze.

Iyaa tjinene nao ambara ami mbasuvera ozombua tjinene mbasuvera ozombua, ozombua mbezesuverera kokutja ambara ovina vimwe mbii tjiwe tjiweikurisa ikotoroo i tjiweikurisa nawa ino mwano mbwikuu mbwi mbwiyenena okuhitasana kweno mutima poo kuno mwinyo woye ombua tjiwekurisa nawa poo tjiweikurisa mongaro mbwa yokutja weirisa weikaendisa ngunda airi ombona poo wei weitumbu nawa ambara indjo ndumbiro mbwa yombua uriri oyo kutjita kutjavi ambara irire orupa romwinyo woye okutja ootjina tjimwe tjimbasuvera tjambo oo oo ozo ozeni nao ozona ndekoneka ndee ambara ze ze zehitasana kuno mwinyo womundu tjimotjaa tjambo oozeni zenoo ze ze zekaa norusuvero kuno mundu ngwezekurisa tjambo ovina ovi ovi ovina mbitjevera oo mbitjevera onganda iya okutja mokutjevera onganda ngwi ambara virihonga o virihonga imbo vandu woponganda omundu nguheri woponganda noho maviyenene okurihonga vyo iya okutja ambara otjimbasuvera ozombua tjambo mba mbivanga kutja mehee mbasuvera ozombua nu ozombua ozombwa toho okutja ambara opumbasuvera ozombua uri.

Kae MaÞunÿu-Tjiparuro Otjomuise-“Owatjiri mauya, u¿anga avehe nautja riyandje ku Mukuru,” ehapu rovandu omasere nomasere yauzukire mokwiimbura eimburiro indi pomautiro womazemburukiro wozombura 94 zondiro yOmbara Otjitambi yOvaherero, Katjikumbua Samuel Maharero Oritjavari muno. Hapo eimburiro indi marihee tjike. Okutoroka omundu konoo munu kutja mariso okuheya otjina tjarwe pendje nokutja omakuruhungi wotjiwana ihi ngekondja okusisikwa mehi eyuva rimwe maeya kowatjiri. Kakutja owatjiri imbwi wautire Oritjavari indi nugwari wauta rukuru nOritjavari yari okutunduuza owatjiri imbwi komurungu. Mowatjiri imbwi muwo muna kokutja Ovaherero vatira ehindi ndiri movita kuna ohoromende yohuurire yehi rOvandoitji. Nu movita imbi avehongorerwa po I Samuel Maharero otjomunae wao nguvaurike. Ouherero otja tjimautjiukwa ndinondi utjiukirwa kotji¿a tjimwe uriri notjo tjiweutundumanisa kutja moukoto mo Namibia nganduu pendje mouye nu omena rombiruriro wawo wohoromende yohuurire yehi rOvandoitji. Ombiruriro indji tjngetjo yari kehi younane womundu umwe uriri otjomunane wOvaherero, nguri Ombara Otjitambi omuyaruke Samuel Maharero. Indji ondjari imwe yohambwaraka¿a yotjikoro momahungi wovahungire peke peke pomazemburukiro wombara Samuel Maharero, eye wina motjiwa¿a tjOvaherero, ngutjiukwa otja Muniovita. Samuel Maharero wakaÞira kOtjauana omayuva tjiyari 14 ku Seninarindi mo 1923 motjirongo ihi o Serowe, tjitjiri tjouhonapare wOvamabatho, owo mburi ouhonapare wa Tsekhedi Khama, ihe ya Seretse Khama, mongutukiro ya Tjauana mo 1966 ngwarira otjiuru tjehindo ekutuke. Seretse Khama ongumeyekukwata ndinondi nguri otjiuru tjehindo nai, Khama Ian Khama. Tsekhedi ongwa sekirisire Ovaherero tjivataura ovita vyo Vandoitji vyo 1904. Omazemburukiro inga ngari poruveze rozombongarero muno indwi ndutjiukwa otjo Gateway, yari kehi yOuhonapare wOmbazu wa Maharero nu movahungire mwari Unotjari Katjimune, eye wina nguri omukwatera wonganda indji nuwina ondekurona yaimba mbahupa kondjembo ya Katjivitjouanga, gwatjere eye omwatje outjaine wombara Maharero tjinga ina omunene aari omwatje wa Maharero; McHenry Venaa¿i, ondekurona tjingetjo yOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja; Fanuel Kaapama omukwatwa wOtjikatjamuaha wina no nongo Ngarikutuke Tjiriange wina ondekurona yOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja. Ovyungura imbi vya kawondjisirwe iyoserekaze Juliet Mupurua, eye wina ondekurona zOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja ndjakakwaterwa kehi ra Tjauana mena rovanene vayo mbahukire ominyo vyao kondjembo ya Katjivitjouanga. Omazemburukiro inga yapatururwe nongumbiro iyondekurona yOtjiÞiro nomurwe omukuru moviÞo vivari, tjongutukiro ya Namibia naitjo tjongamburiro posya kuye mbyari otji¿a tjimwe, omuhonge Petrus Tjijombo. Waresere omambo okuza morukarorwa, Salomo, Ekondwa o 19 omazeva 23 no 26 muwo ngehungira ohunga nomwatje ngwaramba ihe monganda. Omundu ngumosasaneke nondjakaha ya Kahandja ohunga nomuriro po komando ondenga yerapi rotjiserandu. Wina okuhandjaura omambo worukarorwa inga omuhonge Tjijombo waryamene komurungu amahungirire kovandu mbeyamburura ovakoke tjeri wina omahovererero wondjakaha tjingeyo ndjiri motjiwana ohunga nomuriro wa Kahandja nozongungu za Kahandja pupasuva ozombanga¿e novakuru peke peke vomuhoko. Katjimune wahitire mongwatero ya Samuel Maharero. Wautire nongumbiro matjere okunene okuhepa ku Ndjambi ngwatjita kutja nandarire kutja omuhoko kwaza ngauyandekwe eye wakara punawo na utuurunga moving tjimuna otumbo two katjombondi. Omena rokutja otjiwana tjatjitire oruyano kuna ndjambi otja ndinondi puperaisiwa iyomambo ngeri kerapi indi eserandu nomambo ngumayetja “Samuel Maharero Mukuru PunaeÞe (S.M.M.P). Katjimune eyuvando mo Serowe tjawa werimuna naisana ovanatje akumbu punawo ameveraera kutja “nambano tjiri meyaruka korwi konganda koyetu ku Tate” tjazumba ahiti mondjuwo aÞu. Omambo tjimaeyekuvaza mo Namibia kombunda yoruveze tjinga amuhari ozoradio poo ozongoze ovandu avetja omumbonde wau kOtjawana tjovikori. Ketambo ra Katjimune kweere Venaa¿i ngwa handjaurire kutja ongwaye Samuel Maharero tjeri ombanga¿e nu tjingetjo ongwaye otja tjee kutjiukwa otjo Tjingundu Hiyamangura? Watjere omuhoko poo omakuruhungi ayehe mouye yena otji¿a tjimwe uriri tjiye ye tundumanisa. Otja tjiuhina moo hungire ehi indi o Egypt nokuhina okutamuna Alexander the Great, no tjiuhina motamuna omuhoko poo otjiwa¿a tjOvazulu nokuhina okutamuna poo okuzemmburuka Shaka, tjingetjo konoo tamuna omuhoko poo otjiwa¿a tjOvaherero nokuhina okutamuna nokuzemburuka Samuel Maharero. Okuyaruka keimburiro epaha ra Tjiute ndurautire naro omazemburukiro inga, “imbo owatjiri mauya” kakutja nai owatjiri mbumauheewa owombwi. Venaa¿i watjere kuza Samuel Maharero wahitisa otjiwa¿a mozondjo nÿa kamburire kovarandise vOvandoitji. Posya wakahurire kutja ozondjo inÿa nandarire imba nambena zari ozovihepwa vye omwini, otjingi tjazo yari okuranda nazo ozondjembo ozo nÿakakutura omuhoko imbwi kotjiwa¿a tjOvakwena. Okuraisa ounane we nokutja owo kaari awayandera pomuhoko wOvaherero uriri, mokupirura ohuurire yOvandoitji eye watjangera ovanane ovakwao tjimuna Hendrik Witbooi na Nehale ya Mpingana wOvandonga. Watjere nandarire moha¿i ya kandinondi motjiwa¿a omakuruhungi inga kanaa yerunduruka. Tjinene inga wokutja Samuel Maharero wari omunane wOvaherero nguhari nekura re momakuruhungi wounane wOuherero. Ngunda momakurhungi wovita mouye ovita avyaruwa momayuva ururi, Venaa¿i watjere Samuel Maharero wanana omuhoko wOvaherero movita kuna Ovandoitji oure womieze hamboumwe. Kaapama watjere Samuel Maharero wari omunane onongo nondoka yoruveze rwe omundu tjimotara kovihando vye oruveze indo okuutira pokutja mo 1878 otjivaya ko Kapa na UaiÞa okutwara otjiposa tjovandu ve kohoromende yehi rOvaingirisa. Pendje na nao wina eye watjanga otutuu peke peke kovandu peke peke mombii tjingeyo tjitjiri wina otjiraisiro tjoundoka we. Kaapama watjere ozondekurona ngazehorere otjihorera otjiwa tjounane wa Samuel Maharero notjotjirumatua tjazo tjinene mokusutisa ombinÿu yovakuru vyazo. Kaapama watjere omatjangwa womakuruhungi wovandu varwe ohunga Novita vyo Vavaherero kuna Ovandoitji pmuraisiwa ao Ovaherero ombauta ovita mbuheri owatjiri. Posya ondjuriro yOvaherero kehi yohuurire yOvandoitji inouhatoi mbweura noukahuke otjiwana mbutjasere okuungurisa mongondjero yotjisuta tjawo. Munao omitanda vyo tjiwa¿a otjivihina okuhepa okuresa omakuruhngi uriri nungwari wina okuye konÿonona. Tjiriange wahungirire kepu rehi pari ongahukiro kutja ehi rinovandu kurayekwa nu tjipenehi ndimariha¿ewa imba kurayekwa rutenga ombasere okuparuka nu imbo varwe aveparukire mwiindi ndahupu kuwo. Pomazemburukiro inga pari ozombara peke peke zomuhoko, omuni womuvanda Tjinaani Maharero, Manasse Zeraeua na Freddy Nguvauva ngwa kuramenenepo ouvara wOvambanderu. Otjiwana tjeere nawa momuzaro wombazu womarapi ayeetatu.

Oku yauza no kupwisa omuhunga wo horomende mbutja omanyomoneno yasere okuutira mo nganda ohepero kutja avehe mehi veute okutara ko ma unguriro warwe omape ngu ma ye tandere ko u rizemburuka oupe na wina ovingurisiwa ovipe. Mena ro kutja ouye oupe kauzara oukuru nu mo mbepo indji Okakarara no Rukondwa rwa Tjozondjupa, otja rumwe oru hongora mo ku tumba vinamwinyo mo Namibia, rwasere oku rira oru kongorera ro mu hunga imbwi. Operesidenda yOkehi ya Namibia, Nangolo Mbumba, nguri omuÞize no mu tjevere wo Maraisiro wa Kakarara, matja. Eye erero otja pa tururire kotjiveta omaraisiro inga, nga utire o tjiveke ihi. Na yendekere kutja ovimamwinyo ovingi mbiza mOrukondua viyenda no minyo, otja ekmbo nda ungurisire, kovikoti, no ku hina kutja kuvyo ku weziwa onÿengu nu munao wina mo nganda otji mu ha memwa oviungura. Watjere omaraisiro inga katja ye karako no kuhino oveye tunduuze no va pwikire muwo. Munao wina oyo ka yesere oku rira otjitjitwa tjovandu oku ri nanepo uriri nungwari tjivazu no ku puratena ehungi re otjiungura tja sere okuutja ku katjotjiri ovarandise no va randise oku pimbasana okurandisasana. Tjingetjo eye wa tokere ovapwike oku vaza ko Kakarara okwiisira ko ngiwizikiro yo Ngooneya ya Tjozondjupa, James Uerikua, po tji tjitwa tjingetjo ngwa tjere owo nai veno otjiungura otjinene mo Tjozondjupa tjo ku vasisa omeva mom ahi omakombe. Munda imbo we Omutize wa Kakarara Olga Tjiurutue, wa kwizikire kutja mo zo mbura omurongo ndu ma zeya tjandje omaraisiro wa Kakara yarire omaraisiro omatenga mehi. Ape ovaraise o 120 omberi po maraisiro inga o 35 vawo nderi ozongetjefa no zo nganda zo horomende. Peno mihoko o 200 vyo zo ngombe, ozonÿu esere na wina ozo ngombo esere. Ovitjitwa imbi ma vi yanda muhuka ngurova otja tji pekara no mizumbi.

Kae MaÞunÿu-Tjiparuro Otjomuise-Vetatu vovahuingire movahungire vane potjihungiriro tjOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja vai kumwe kutja imba mbaihamisiwa iyotjiÞiro itjo ombu mavetjiwa omwiihamo wawo nu munao otjivasere okurihungirirapo oveni. Onganda yomahongero wokombanda ya Namibia, ousupi o Unama, Oritjatatu yasekirisire otjihungiro ohunga nOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja puyanangere ozonongo peke ine Ombara Otjitami yOvaherero, Vekuii Rukoro, Onongo Henning Melber, ondekurona yOtjitiro Otjindjandja yOvakwena, Sima Luipert nonongo Fanuel Kaapama. Otjihungiriro ihi tjakayendisirwe iyOnongo John Nakuta wonganda indji neye nguri omupyuke mokutja omahongero wokombanda poo ouhongwa ukare nuutare netweho kondumbo mbwa youndu. Otjihungiriro ihi tjananene ovandu ovengi okuza mongabda indji oini mumuna ozomitiri zayo okuza kotupa peke peke, tjimuna onongo nombuke momahongero ngatuwa pehi Andre du Pisani nawina omutanda ohorooze movyomitanda nondumbo yotjiwana, Job Amupanda, ngutjuukirwa kongondjero yokutja kangamwa auhe mo Nambia makare nopona pumatwotjiuru, okutja ehi pumatungu omututu we. Otjihungiriro ihi tjari ongondoroka nokutja komayandero wombura indji o 2015 ozohoromende za Namibia nehi rOvandoitji zakutasana ohunga omakuruhungi wOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja tjo 1904-1908 nokutja mazetjizire mukee munda nu tjinene mokutja tjii hapo imba mbaihamisiwe itjo momutjinononga hapo Veripi kutja veyenene okukururamenwapo pupayenene oro nai ndiri epu ndipaÞansanisiwa tjinene. Okupaturura nokuserura ondjira yotjihungiriro ihi, Nakuta waÞanderere ke Artikeri 21 rOngunÿeveta ya Namibia ohunga nomausemba wombutiro momausemba warwe peke peke mumuna kutja omundu auhe makara nousemba wokurihungirira nokuritwapo muwo wina mumuna ousemba wozonganda zozokurande nozombuze; ousemba wourizemburuka, wouripura nongamburiro muwo mumuna ousemba wozonganda zokombanda zomerihongero. Munao otjaraisa kutja motjihunguriro ihi otjimakawondja nokuhina okuritira, ondira poo ongarera natwo ombara otjitambi yOvaherero kembo. Eye waraisa ombara otjitambi otjomupikasane ohongora motjihungiriro tjOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja nai tjitjiripo posya ombara oini aimuÞunu kutja ngunda indji ondando uriri ndjihiyayenisiwa. Omokutja nai eye novakwao mbekayenda pamwe kaveri motjihungiriro ihi vapaterwa pendje iyozohoromende azeembari inÿa ya Namibia noyehi rOvandoitji. Munao ngunda eye otjeri ohorooze yotjirwa tjokutja imba mbaihamisiwa verihungirirepo oveni, nondando indji tjiyayenenisiwa eye otjimarire ohorooze yotjihungiriro kunohoromende yehi rOvandoitji. Matja owo vapaterwa pendje kehi yomapengero wombepo ndjayakurwa mOmbongarero yOtjiwaṋa ohunga nOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja mo 2006 ndjiri ongahuke kokutja imba mbaihamwa vasere okurihungirira po oveni. Epu indi okutja ovahungire varwe okuvarondere pendje na Kaapama ngwaraisire kokutja otjihungiriro tjitjiripo nai nai owo wina otjivaihamisiwa vamuna kutja okamuvero kukapaturura ohoromende kovaihamisiwa verire orupa notjihungiriro ihi kavena okukepatisisa nugwari mavekekambura nomake ayeevari otja tjivapukata nai kutja ndinondi verire orupa notjihungiro tjitjiripo nai pokati kozohoromende azeembari inÿa. Posya Rukoro maraise kutja nandarire kutja ombepo yOtjitiro Otjindjandja ohoromende ya Namibia kuyiungurira nai yapitira mOmbongarero yOtjiwa¿a yjiyatuwa kotjiriro iyombarra otjitambi omuyaruke Kuaima Riruako, ohoromende kundinondi yahuurisa ombepo indji. Yeihuurisa mokutja imba mbasere okurira ondimwa yotjiposa ihi, mberi ovaihamisiwa kundinondi karupa rotjihungiriro pkati kohoromende ya Namibia noyehi rOvandoitji. Matja eye nozombara ozongwa zombazu kapuna indi vanangwa kotjihungiriro ihi ndoovazu vasere okunangwa otjoveni votjiposa. Omanangere ngeere yere ku Festus Muundjua otjomuÞize wOkomiti yOtjitiro Otjindjandja tjOvaherero nOvambanderu. Kaapama matja owo otjovaihamisiwa vehaama motjihungiriro ihi otjovatie kukuheri okupuratena uriri poo okuhaama kongotwe nu ndoovazu eyuva rimwe vena tjivanyengwa poo tjivehina okuhitasana omuvero kuwo uri kamwaha okurinanununa. Melba matja eye otjonongo ouzeu okuyenena mozongaku zovahamisiwa numunao ovahaimisiwa ombu mavetjiwa omwiina wawo notjivasere ookuuyavara oveni. Ozonongo tjivasere okuyandja oruyameto uriri otja koupupurukwe wotjitamba tjawo tjounongo. Oo imba nambena ombongarero yari norunywaa tjinene ohunga na Kaapama ngwaahavanga okwiisana Rukoro otjombara. Ihi tjayetere omaunaunino mokati kovapuratene mbaa vemunika ayo ovakongorere va Rukoro. Kombunda yovahungire vane otjiawana tjaperwe oruveze okupura omapuririor omengi ngahungamene na Kaapama. Movapure mwari Job Amupanda ngwavanga okuzuva kovahungire aveine kokutja hapo ovo vena ozongee ndando zokutjita kokutja omitanda wina vihare ombango motjiposa tjOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja kutja ndinondi outi wambeto tjiwai kohurututu otjiposa atjihayanda punawo. Wina umwe wovapuratene wavanga okuzuva kokutja pendje nOvaherero nOvakwena penomihoko vyarwe wina mbyaihamwa nu tjii hapo maveririsiwa rune orupa rOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja. Rukoro matja mongondjero yotjiporotika mapeyeneye posya moveta mapekurungisa otjiposa tjinga era arahungamene omihoko vivari imbi uriri.

Kae MaÞunÿu-Tjiparuro Otjomuise-Orutu rOvaherero nOvambanderu rOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja marutja ombara otjitambi yOvaherero, omuyaruke Kuaima Riruako wauta otjiposa tjOtjiÞiro Otjiandjandja notjisuta nu momwano umwe poo warwe wari aatanda kutja metjiyeta kotjikoro. Posya ndinondi eye ketjitjipo rukwao nungwari eye otjeheripo nai orutu indwi omikato imbi mbyasewako marumutupukire naru mumanene. Inga ongari omambo wa Inge Murangi, oka¿epo korutu indwi Oritjatano ndazuko metuwo romerinaneno rokomando yerapi rOtjiserandu pomazemburukiro wozombura ndatu zondiro yomuyaruke ombara otjitambi Riruako. Watjere ndinondi otjiposa itji tjavaza pomahakayeneno nu wina omaha¿ikiro wozondjira, puperi po¿a opayame poo opahupise nu munao otjimapehepwa omasa noupanÿi okutwara otjirwa tjotjisuta komurungu. “Munao otjimatuso okuzemburuka omeriyandjero we kotjirwa ngehari nokuurwa, omeripunguhiro we ngehari nomaivaiviro nawina ondjira komurungu ombaera. Imbi avihe matuvihepa. Tjitwatoora ondjira ndjiheriyo pomahanikiro wozondjira inga ibmi avihe eye mbyaakambura muvyo mavirire omugandjo nu itjo katjimatuzeri,” Murangi matja. Matja memuzemburuka otjomurwe omuhaivaive ngwatiere okuhungama otjihungame tjohoromende yehi rOvandoitji ohunga nokuhina okuripurira kungamwa tjimatjiputuka. Ombara otjitambi kaari nokunatja kutja ohoromende yEhi rOvandoitji ohoromende yomasa ndjatambukisa ovita avuyevari vyouye, ovitenga novitjavari. Posya otjohoroose wotjirwa tjOtjiÞiro Otjiandjandja nOtjisuta, eye kena pakara nondira yomasa omahimise wohoromende yEhi rOvandoitji. Ondjira ye yari imwe uriri. Okuyenda komurungu kotjisuta. Ombara otjitambi omuyaruke Riruako mo 2004 watwara otjiwa¿a tje kotuveze peke peke twomakuruhungi wombiririro yotjiwa¿a wohuurire yOvandoitji. Oko Kahandja ovita muvyautira tjiyari 12 ku Rozondu mo 1904; Okandjira ovazandona va Kauari muvaraisa oupandi wawo tjiyari 9 ku Kozonjanga; Ohamakari tjiyari 14 ku Katjose povihando oviseinina vyotjiwana kuna von Trotha nu tjiyari 26 ku Katjose etjitwara ko Keseta okukerikwamba kuna ombara Munjuku Nguvauva oku kazemburuka ovita vya Lampe. “Pomazemburukiro ayehe inga ombuze ye kohoromende yOvandoitji yari ongahuke ‘Ngatuhaame pamwe tuhungire’.” Okuhungire kumwe ingwi aaheye oviwana mbyaihamwa mOtjitiro Otjindjandja okutarasana movitoko vyomeho nohoromende yOvandoitji, Murangi matja. Matja komuyaruke onbara otjitambi yOvaherero Riruako, oviwa¿a mbyaihamisiwa iyo TjiÞiro Otjindjandja vyari omihandjauke. Yari Ovaherero, Ovambanderu nOvakwena apehe puveri. “Otja tjimatutjiwa ndinondi ovandu imba veri mo Namibia, Otjauana na South Africa- eye kaayanderere mo Namibia uriri. Keeripurire kotjisuta tjitjihina okuvaza kovandu vetu momahi wozonganda. Zemburuka kokutja ovandu vetu mo Mau, Mahalapye, Tsabong, Lephalela, na nao kaveire kotuveze itwo kombango yawo oveni nungwari vahuka ozohanga novarwe varwe vovita vOvandoitji. Tjiri otjiihamise okuzuva kutja nai pena ovihungiriro mbimaviheewa mbimakuzu nai viyenda yenda okuya kotjikoro, nondando oyo kuviyeta kotjikoro nokuhina okuripurira kovandu vetu momahi wozonganda,” Murangi matja. Matja ndinondi ovihungiriro imbi vikayendera kombepo yOtjiÞiro Otjindjandja ndjayakurwa mo 2006 iyOmbongarero yOtjiwa¿a nokuhina eraka rimwe mairipirura. Posya ndinondi ombepo indji itorokerwa wina itjiva mozonÿero zao oveni zokupukisa.

Jehova wa yandjere oviṋa ovingi oviwa ku Adam na Eva. Genesis 1:28 Jehova wa ungura omukazendu omutenga, Eva, nu e mu yandja ku Adam a rire omukazendu we.—Genesis 2:21, 22. Jehova we ve mema nourizemburuka notutu otuhomonena, tu tu ha ri notjipo. Omaturiro wawo ya ri otjikunino tjaEden, tji tja ri oruveze oruwa orumanise ndwa ri nozonḓonḓu nomiti vyovihape novipuka. Jehova aa hungire ku na wo nu ee ve hongo. Andakuzu va puratena ku ye, owo atjave hupa nga aruhe mOparadisa kombanda yehi. Mukuru we ve raera kutja a ve ri komuti umwe motjikunino. Genesis 2:16, 17 Umwe wovaengeli wa pirukira Mukuru. Omuengeli omurunde ngwi oSatan Omudiaboli. Jehova wa raisira Adam na Eva omuti umwe wovihape motjikunino nu e ve raere kutja tji va ri ku wo mave ṱu. Satan kena pa vanga kutja Adam na Eva ve puratene ku Jehova. Okutja wa ungurisa onyoka okuraera Eva kutja tja ri kotjihape tji va tjaerwa okurya, eye kamaa koka, nungwari ma sana ku Mukuru. Ihi tja ri otjizeze.—Genesis 3:1-5.

`amukayora pounauvari utatu mbo tjingawazu noku mana puwo mbo mwakatwapasana ozondunge ohunga nomeritungiro wokuyenda komurungu ambara tjimaihaa kutjombokera omirongo vyomuhuka mbo tjomundu ngumbasuvera okatee epaha okunwapo ekopi rotee tjimbazu nokunwa ekopi rotee movikando nao mbikara nokulesa omambo etjihaama etjilese katiti iyaa tjingambazu nokulesa katiti tjandje nao katiti oiri yakarekareka mbakotoka mbatwapo eriro rometaha tjimaihaa kutjombokera ozoimwe zomahatenya ookuria eriro randje rometaha monao tjimayiutu okuza mozombari mbo etjipuratene koradio kokutja maihepuraye okakore okatenda okakore komambo iyaa tjingambazumbo mbetjisekama okuhona hona katiti okurinyaturura omarama tjinga mbakotoka ponganda.

I Kae Matundu-Tjiparuro na Kuvee Kangueehi OTJOMUISE Omuzandano ngwatire Oritjatano ngurova mOnderambapa tji pakarere onyungu nyungu pokati kovature va Mongua no tjimbumba tjitjari po ma tuirisiro wo rata yOuhonapare wOmbazu wOtjimaharero ma pakwa iyo tjiwana tjOvaherero muhuka po rumbo ro zombangane ro mbongo yo Ruhindo mo Kahandja. Theboy Hiiho, watire nozo mbura o 25 iyo hanga ngamba ndji yi hiya kara no hongonono ongahuke kutja yazire pi pokati koporise, ovimbumba vyo vature va Mongua no tjimbumba tjitjari po matuirisiro wOrata Ewald Kazongominja. Omandaha ovature ape 500 va Mongua va raisire onyengo yawo no matuirisiro wo rata Kazongominja Oritjatano ndazuko na pehara onyungu nyungu ndja tjururirwe iyo porise. Ombameno ya u tire Oritjatano ndazuko omuhuka omunene otjiwana tja Mongua tji tja zuvire kutja Kazongominja Oritjaine ngurova otja vazere mo Mongua okukara nomukandi wo matuirisiro we Orovyungura. Otjiwana tja wo ronganene mOnderombapa na tji pata ondjira ndji maizu kEpako okutjaera Kazongominja noruhindo rwe mu mwari Ombara Kaihepovazandu Maharero. Otjiwana tja tonene mondando yatjo indji noruhindo indui aru tinyauka okuyaruka kEpako. Oro rwa yarukirire o ndjira kati Kondonderombapa puna oporise. Ihi katjina tji tja tja tjaerere ovature va Mongua tjinga ava umbire Kazongominja noruhindo rwe nomawe n andarire kutja vari puna oporise. Mo nyungu nyungu indji o mu mwa yaherwe Hiiho. Omatuirisiro inga ya turikirwe indu o Ministera Ondenga yOkehi, Libertine Amathila tja ningirire Kazongominja nao. Ovature va Mongua vena o u zeu no rata mo yao ndja zikwa iyo o u honapare wo mbazu wo resevate ya Tjinene. Ngunda aperi nao Omandaha Amathila otja hakaenene no vimbumba avi yevari imbi okuzuva kutja pa kayendere tjike. Omukondonone wo Kombanda mOporise Amulungu watja otjiuru tjo porise tja sembamisisre ongondononeno yo kuteza orupa roporise mo nyungu yungu indji. Po mbongarero yawo yo zombuze pOkomando Oritjatatu ovature va Mongua va raisire ongaro ombi yo porise mo nyungu nyungu indji. Muyo mwari omambo wayo kutja ovature va Mongua mave vanga oku papurura Omongua kehi. “Owene otjiwana tjovandu o 12,000 uriri nami me yenene oku mu zengisa mozoiri mbari,” Omuyandjambo wotjimbumba tjo porise tji tja hindirwe ko Mongua makuzu watjere nao. Ngunda aperi nao mo ma kayendero wo tjiveke ihi ko Mongua aakuzu ozondaze peke peke zomawini wovandu ngu maye nyonwa. Muwo muna ongoze ya Kazongominnja ndja konderwe novinamwinyo vye, vya Kerina Mburumba na Rehabeam Katjijova mbya zengire. Wina makuzu ondarata yonganda ya Mburumba ya konderwe. Omakuiya potuingi ye ungurisiwa otjomasasanekero uriri mOmbeibela. Owo mape ya ye kahurura ovandu ovapikapike poo oviṋa mbi eta omauzeu. (Num 33:55; Omiano 22:5; Esek 28:24) Indu Paulus tja tjanga ohunga ‘nokuiya monyama,’ eye mape ya aa hungire ohunga novaapostele wovizeze na varwe mbaave mu pirukire nu mbaave pirura otjiungura tje tjouapostele. Omatjangwa nge ri kehi mba maye raisa ovikeṋa vyarwe mbi mavi tjama ‘nokuiya monyama’ Paulus nda ri na ro? Hapo otjikeṋa tji tji ri tjimuna “okuiya monyama” kove? Mo yenene vi okuṱaṱera ku Jehova kokutja u yenene okutjinda okuiya ngo?

Mbimuna kutja nai otjimariva matjiyenene okuyeta ohange orundu tjiuno tjimariva ovina avihe maviwire moruveze rwavyo uriri, uno vimariva uno viungura vyoye oviwa mbi umuna ovimariva umuna otjitjamurongo tjoye unoo unetemba roye ndi ndiuvanga okukara naro unoo vanatje imba vehupa nawa vehita kozoskole nderizo, otjimariva omotjimariva nai kwami oohange poo ngahino noho hange maihanika kutja nai ohange ndjiuvanga poo ndjiuhungirirako, ooine mara kwami tjiri tjiri otjimariva matjiyenene okundjiyetera ohange uriri ndjaenene uriri mena rokutja nai hinee vanga hinee vanga nandaee omundu okundjiraera kutja nii wendjisuvera nu posia kena kuyenena okundjivatera, nandii mehepa eyovi uriri okusuta oskole yandje kona kuyenena okundjivatera okusuta eyovi ndo posia wendjisuveraa? Etje vanga omundu uriri tjoondovazu wendjisuvera nu ngumaenen okurihupisa orihupisa omuni oenene okundjihupisa noho. tjiri tjiri potungi nu tjiri tjiri ovina mbyo vikauta otjitandi uriri aami ekauta omundu warwe ngunovimariva pove nambano aikarira ovina aayo tutatumisanana poo rusuvero rwaanda poo ngahino yari ouye imbo warukuru tjiri ovandu tjave tjavehena aavehepa otjimariva. mara mouye mumatuhupire nai nu, ngunda mbakurama kembo randje rokutja otjimariva matjiyenene okuyeta ohange ndjaenene uriri.

NGATU tje mo zuvarisa okuza kondjuwo nondjuwo, nu ookuzuva ombosiro yohauto yoporise okuza kokure. Noyo ai utu okuzuvakera ko tjinene. Ngunda amo hungire ku nomunionganda pondjuwo oitjakwao, omukweṋu ngu mamu zuvarisa pamwe a munu ohauto yoporise ndje ya okukurama pondjuwo pu mamu zuvarisa. Omuporise arire tja heruka na pura kutja, “Oweṋe mbu mamu ryanga okuza kondjuwo nondjuwo okuhungira ku novandu ohunga nOmbeibela? Ovandu ovengi mave unauna ohunga na eṋe!” Eṋe amu ziri nondengero namu ritjiukisa kutja oweṋe Ovahongonone vaJehova. Maku kongorere tjike? Ovikongorere ko mavi zu kekuruhungi rehi reṋu. Mozombura nḓa kapita, ohoromende yehi mu wa tura aai tjindi vi Ovahongonone vaJehova? I yandjera ovandu okukara nongamburiro yawo oveni poo indee? Tji peri nao, ngahino omena romuano ovakambure ovakweṋu ozombura nḓa kapita mu va ungura oukukutu ‘okuyeura ombuze ombwa mombanguriro nokuhongonona ouatjiri.’ (Fil. 1:7) Kainatja kutja wa tura pi, tji we ripurire oukoto komuano Ovahongonone vaJehova mu va kara nondoṋeno onene movyombanguriro, maku yanḓiparisa ongamburiro yoye. Morupa ndwi matu katara kondoṋeno ohimise ndji twa kara na yo. Ondoṋeno yetu ndjo otjiraisiro otjiwa tjokutja Ouhona otjiṋa tjatjiri, orondu katja tu yenena okutoṋa pu pe ṱeki mbo momasa wetu oveni! MORUPA NDWI EKONDWA 13 Ovapangure movyombanguriro ndino va yakura oumune wonongo yOmatwako, Gamaliel. EKONDWA 14 Ondatumisire onene ndje ya kOvahongonone vaJehova mena rokuhina okutoorora omunda ya isapewa i oviṋa mbyaatu ha undjire ko. EKONDWA 15 Ovakarere vaMukuru va rwira ousemba wawo wokukara nonḓuviro komatwako wOuhona waMukuru.

I Kae Matundu-Tjiparuro ONDEHUKA Ovature va Ndehuka kavena ohange kutja nandarire kutja orutjeno rukapitira motjirongo tjao mumuna ondanda yokehi royutjeno ovo pozonganda zao kavena orutjeno notjirongo tjazema indi nganda tjazemine. Umwe wovature votjirongo ihi mOkarukondua ka Tjombinde mOrukondua rwa Maheke, o Nanguiiwe Henguva, wonganda ape ozometa o 200 komurungu wondanda yorutjeno indji. Poye eye watuako okapanera kemwe korutjeno rweyuva keungurisa komarambe. Otja kuye o NamPower tjiyaningira ehi rokutunga po ondando yorutjeno indji yari kokutja tjazumba ovo motjirongo mavemunu orutjeno. Yarire ozombura ape mbari nai okuza ko 2006 ondanda indji tjiyatungwa posyo o NamPower yekeritua pehi, ovature kavena orutjeno otjirongo tjazema. Henguva matja nandarire moruvze romananeno wa Willy Hoveka otjorata yOkarukondua kOmatoororero, vatjita omaningiriro korutjeno nu ngamba kavetjiwa kutja omaningiriro wao yakazengirapi? Eye waraisa ounahepero worutjeno kokuterekera ko, kondjerera mondjuwo nawina okuramba ondorera monganda. Tjingetjo orutjeno omundu moyenene okuruungurisa okupomba nayo omeva nawina kozomahina zarwe tjimuna omahina yokunyosa ovitenda. “Orutjeno otjina ohepero kovature vokombanda tjimuna tjiruri ohepero kovatite vovihuro,” eye matja. Henguva mamunu kutja vatjitua otjineya okuraerwa kutja ngaveyandje ehi rao tjazumba vepewe orutjeno tjitjiri otjina tjitjihiyatjitua ngamba. “Ete tuatjitua otjineya,” wanunisa konduvasaneno ndjimatja yari oyo kotjinyo. Wakumwa kutja ongwaye ovo mberi motjirongo mumuna ondanda indji veri kuzema ngunda ovirongo vyarwe tjimuna oo Listera na Tjovazandu avina orutjeno. “Onganda imwe irimbena, yarwe iri mbee,” matja okuraisa oupopezu wonganda motjirongo ihi nondanda yorutjeno indji. Orata yOkarukondua, Mati Ndjoze, tjingetjo wakumwa puna ovature kutja ongwaye otjirongo ihi tjitjihina orutjeno nandarire indjo onganda ndjina ondanda yorutjeno indji ozometa o 200 kongotue yayo nyee nduu. Otja kuye o NamPower ipatana kutja pari omazuvasaneno ngasano ingo pokati kayo novature. Matja nandarire pena ovirongo tjiva vyozondarata zotumbo ndakondua kutja ongoze yorutjeno ikapitire po. Ozondarata inda zasewa nao ngamba no NamPower okuhina okuzetuna nandarire okutuapo omivero oyo yaya yekeritua pehi. Munao ozongombe zovatuta otjizehita momahi wovatuta varwe. Ndjoze matja mOkarukondua ke orutjeno ndueya ozoperesende o 0.01 movirongo vitatu uriri moresevate aihe mo Tjombinde, o Listera na Tjovazandu. Eye wina kena ongamburiro kutja orutjeno morukondua rwe okuriri maruya. “Ami orutjeno nongaro yomaunguriro muriri nai hina kumuna ko ombaera,” Ndjoze matja. Matja orutjeno runa otjituesa nu pupena orutjeno pena omekurisiro. Pupehina orutjeno tjingetjo kanaa pekara nomekurisiro. Matja orutjeno orunahepero kovina ovingi nandarire kozongetjefa ozonditi nawina komahakaeneno. John Kaimu wo NamPower matja owo kaveyamuna ouhatoi mbumaitja o NamPower yayanisa kutja maihaondjisa ovature imba korutjeno.

Oritjavari movandu o 120, o 72 ova Tjomuise nOmandaha movandu o 190, o 152 ova Tjomuise. Osondaha mo vandu o 247 mba munikire ondwi indji o 136 ova Tjomuise n nOroviungura Otjomuise tjari novavere o 109 movavere o 181 mba munikwa omutjise imbwi no Ritjatano ndazuko tjiyari 14 komweze imbwi movavere o 182, Otjomuise tjari no 91. O Ministera yOuveruke nOzombatero Zombwiro yOtjiwa¿a, Onganga Kalumbi Shangula, wa raisire kutja ongahukiro nambano kutja omutjise imbwi wa tjindire mOtjomuise otjo nai mo Namibia, tji tja ruruma Ezorongondo otjo nÿepe omutjise tjinga nambano omutjise imbwi awa undu mutjo. Shangula wina maraisa ongendo no vi varero vyo va vere vo Covid-19 mo Maheke mbi yerurukira ko eyapa yuva. Matja owo vauta okumuna kutja omutjise ombwi mOrukondwa rwa Maheke wauto kuhonapara okuza komweze imbwi tjiyari hambombari. Oritjavari tjandje otjivarero tjovandu mba munika omutjise imbwi mOmaheke tjavaza ovandu omurongo. Muvyu vari ovandu veÞunÿu rimwe mbaisa komundu ngwa munikwa omutjise imbwi meÞunÿu indi. Outja murongo omukurukaze wo zo mbura o 84 okuza ko resevate ya Mongua, ngwa munika ovika¿ena vyo mutjise mbwi nandarire kutja kena ondambo yokutja wa hakayena kuna omundu ngunawo. Omukurukaze ingwi tjiyari 13 komweze imbwi, Oritjaine ndazuko, otja nanwa ombinÿu kutja ikatarewe. Otjomukurundu omutukare no mu verandu wa yakurwa monamiti ya Pako. Oritjatatu, Shangula, otja tjivisire kutja ketjipo rukwao wazapere. Eye wari umwe wo vaÞi wo mutjise imbwi Shangula mba tjivisire Oritjatatu.
